<?php /** * Validates nntp (Network News Transfer Protocol) as defined by generic RFC 1738 */ class HTMLPurifier_URIScheme_nntp extends HTMLPurifier_URIScheme { /** * @type int */ public $default_port = 119; /** * @type bool */ public $browsable = false; /** * @param HTMLPurifier_URI $uri * @param HTMLPurifier_Config $config * @param HTMLPurifier_Context $context * @return bool */ public function doValidate(&$uri, $config, $context) { $uri->userinfo = null; $uri->query = null; return true; } } // vim: et sw=4 sts=4
